# Data Source (hush_gcp_wif_access_credential)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a GCP WIF access credential in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_gcp_wif_access_credential" "example" {
  id = "acr-eu12345678"
}

output "name" {
  value = data.hush_gcp_wif_access_credential.example.name
}

output "issuer_url" {
  value = data.hush_gcp_wif_access_credential.example.issuer_url
}

output "project_number" {
  value = data.hush_gcp_wif_access_credential.example.project_number
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the GCP WIF access credential

### Read-Only

- `audience` (String) The audience for the GCP WIF access credential
- `deployment_ids` (List of String) List of deployment IDs that can access this credential
- `description` (String) The description of the GCP WIF access credential
- `issuer_url` (String) The issuer URL for the GCP WIF access credential
- `kind` (String) The kind of access credential
- `name` (String) The name of the GCP WIF access credential
- `pool_id` (String) The workload identity pool ID
- `project_number` (String) The GCP project number
- `type` (String) The type of access credential
- `workload_provider_id` (String) The workload identity provider ID
